company.name: Every
company.description: AI-powered tools for builders and founders

employees.name: Dan Shipper
employees.archetypeDescription: Dual threat: can score (narrative) and facilitate (team). Drives the offense.
employees.signatureMove: The Founder Thread — long-form narrative that converts readers to believers

x.notes: Primary surface. Founder narrative + product updates.

linkedin.notes: Professional presence, less active than X.

newsletter.notes: Same as Substack. High open rates.

podcast.notes: Guest appearances and host of Every podcast.

github.notes: Personal account visible. Limited code activity.

youtube.notes: No dedicated channel. Occasional guest clips.

product_hunt.notes: Maker on multiple products. No profile attached to Every products.

absentOpportunities.title: Founder Video Essays
absentOpportunities.description: Dan's writing voice would translate to video essays. High trust gravity potential.

absentOpportunities.title: Every Org Visibility
absentOpportunities.description: Attach Every products to GitHub org. Builder credibility.

dynamicDuos.effect: Dan narrative + Austin conversion = +15% Trust Gravity on launch days
Dan's vision + Kieran's conviction = product-market clarity

scoutingNotes: Elite at long-form narrative. His essays are the team's most reliable trust-building asset.
Low promo density (12%) but high conversion when he does ask. The anti-spammer.
Absent on video surfaces — biggest untapped potential for audience expansion.

employees.name: Austin Tedesco
employees.archetypeDescription: High pass accuracy, creates for others, converts off assists. The floor general.
employees.signatureMove: The Conversion Thread — efficient volume with surgical CTAs

x.notes: Primary surface. High-efficiency posts, strong engagement.

linkedin.notes: Professional growth content. Lower volume than X.

substack.notes: Discovered surface. Growth experiments + case studies.

product_hunt.notes: No maker profile attached to Every products.

absentOpportunities.title: Operationalize Austin's Substack
absentOpportunities.description: Substack discovered but underutilized. Cross-promote with Every newsletter for compounding.

absentOpportunities.title: Claim Product Hunt Maker Profile
absentOpportunities.description: Attach Austin as maker on Every products. Attribution leak.

absentOpportunities.title: Growth Engineering Visibility
absentOpportunities.description: Show growth experiments as code. Builder credibility.

dynamicDuos.effect: Austin conversion + Dan narrative = +15% Trust Gravity on launch days
Austin's CTAs + Kieran's conviction = highest trial conversion rate

scoutingNotes: Elite assist rate (17.8%). The team's best playmaker — creates scoring chances for others.
Low promo density (9%) but highest TS% relative to follower count. Efficient volume.
Substack is the highest-opportunity absent surface — content exists in his head, the surface doesn't.

employees.name: Brandon Gell
employees.archetypeDescription: Protects brand reputation, high interior presence. The defensive anchor.
employees.signatureMove: The Authentic Post — unpolished, high-trust content that converts through honesty

dynamicDuos.effect: Brandon's authenticity + Kieran's conviction = Cora's best trust signal

Low coverage score (52) but high trust gravity per post. Quality over quantity.
Personal shot distribution (45%) is highest on team — his voice IS the brand.

employees.name: Kate Lee

Teaches the GMs about editorial trust — her process is the playbook.

employees.name: Kieran Klaassen

product_hunt.notes: Maker profile exists. Not attached to Cora.

scoutingNotes: Highest philosophy shot distribution (55%). The team's conviction anchor.
60x gap: philosophy tweet gets 315 likes, promo tweet gets 5. Model says: 2 mid-range passes → 1 three-pointer.
Only visible GitHub employee. This is a massive differentiator for builder trust.
Lowest turnover rate (2%). Every post is intentional.
